violations.text: (Steak and cheese) was observed held at (123) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165 and above. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

(Pastries) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address.PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The following non-food contact surfaces of the an accumulation debris: -mixer shield -equipment storage shelves -grill shelves -2 dr freezers(interior) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The floors in kitchen and stockroom have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Various items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - mixer shield - Good Humor Freezer - food containers (old label residue) - food containers on drying rack near 3 bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
The floors in the storage area is in poor repair (crack/hole with exposed wood). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

(Various pastries) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Handwashing sinks in kitchen area is lacking signage. A sign or poster must posted notifying food employees to wash their hands must be provide at all handwashing sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
Deli meat was observed with datemarking exceeding 7 days.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
Splashguard needed between the kitchen hand sink and the prep table area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The floors throughout kitchen(behind equipment) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the floor drains (3 bay sink and dishwashing area) have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor drains (3 bay sink and dishwashing area) have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The wall juncture in the hot-holding area is in poor repair. Plastic attachment observed loose and separating from wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) was observed corrosion. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed and unit taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
The robo-coupe was observed in poor repair. Unit observed cracked and taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
The dishwasher is in poor repair. Leak observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
